email_body:
Beste Trosort-team,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de Social Media Intern positie. Jullie missie om textielstortplaatsen te verminderen spreekt me enorm aan, en ik wil graag bijdragen met mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en contentcreatie.

Als junior digital marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik voor mijn eigen project mirook.com sociale media (Instagram/Facebook) geïntegreerd en video's bewerkt met Canva. Ik ben gewend zelfstandig te werken en snel nieuwe platforms te leren.

Ik begrijp dat jullie volledige autonomie bieden voor TikTok, Instagram, Facebook en Shorts. Mijn technische achtergrond in SEO en GEO helpt om content niet alleen viraal te laten gaan, maar ook echte B2B-leads te genereren. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen).

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn portfolio te delen en mijn motivatie toe te lichten in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Trosort team,

I am very excited to apply for the Social Media Intern position. Your mission to reduce textile landfills strongly resonates with me, and I want to contribute with my experience in digital marketing and content creation.

As a junior digital marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress sites. For my own project mirook.com, I integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook) and edited videos using Canva. I am used to working independently and quickly learning new platforms.

I understand you offer full autonomy for TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and Shorts. My technical background in SEO and GEO helps create content that not only goes viral but also generates real B2B leads. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons).

I look forward to sharing my portfolio and discussing my motivation in a conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Social Media Intern bij Trosort. Jullie missie om textielstortplaatsen tegen te gaan door middel van innovatieve sorteermachines vind ik inspirerend. Ik wil graag mijn digitale marketingvaardigheden inzetten om jullie zichtbaarheid te vergroten en gekwalificeerde B2B-leads te genereren.

Als junior digital marketer bij Episto (2026-heden) ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools als SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik voor mijn eigen project mirook.com een complete website ontworpen en sociale media (Instagram/Facebook) geïntegreerd. Ik heb video's bewerkt met Canva en gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) geïmplementeerd om vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Jullie zoeken iemand die zelfstandig sociale mediakanalen kan opzetten en beheren. Ik ben gewend autonoom te werken en snel nieuwe platforms te leren. Mijn technische kennis van SEO en GEO helpt om content te creëren die niet alleen scoort op trends, maar ook echte leads oplevert. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren).

Ik begrijp dat deze functie onbetaald is, maar ik zie het als een kans om mijn portfolio uit te breiden en bij te dragen aan een duurzame missie. Ik ben flexibel beschikbaar voor een hybride/remote samenwerking.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ideeën verder toe te lichten in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very excited to apply for the Social Media Intern position at Trosort. Your mission to combat textile landfills through innovative sorting machines is inspiring. I want to use my digital marketing skills to increase your visibility and generate qualified B2B leads.

As a junior digital marketer at Episto (2026-present), I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building/maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, for my own project mirook.com, I designed a complete website and integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook). I edited videos using Canva and implemented structured data (JSON-LD) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI search engines.

You are looking for someone who can independently set up and manage social media channels. I am used to working autonomously and quickly learning new platforms. My technical knowledge of SEO and GEO helps create content that not only trends but also generates real leads. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve).

I understand this position is unpaid, but I see it as an opportunity to expand my portfolio and contribute to a sustainable mission. I am flexibly available for hybrid/remote collaboration.

I hope to further explain my motivation and ideas in a conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Video editing and social media content creation (Canva, Instagram/Facebook integration for mirook.com)
- SEO & GEO expertise to create high-retention, lead-generating content
- Self-starter: independently built and managed mirook.com website and social channels
- WordPress and web design skills for setting up and maintaining online presence
- B1 Dutch (actively improving) and fluent English, suitable for Flemish/Belgian context
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Video editing & social media: Canva, social media content & integration (Instagram, Facebook), video editing for short-form content
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
